summary: Completed comprehensive testing of premium collection gallery redesign. Both Calanques (Mediterranean) and Sunset (Cinematic) themes working perfectly with immersive hero sections, premium galleries, and responsive design.

minor_api_errors.issue: Returns 404 but frontend gracefully falls back to local data
minor_api_errors.impact: No user-facing impact - collections load correctly

minor_api_errors.issue: Returns 404 when adding items to wishlist
minor_api_errors.impact: Wishlist button clicks but doesn't persist data

navigation_issues.issue: Clicking 'Couchers de Soleil' from collections page doesn't navigate properly

minor_mobile_issues.issue: Back button selector timeout on mobile (likely in hamburger menu)

passed_tests: Calanques Collection: Mediterranean theme with turquoise badge 'Méditerranée Sauvage'
Calanques Collection: All atmosphere tags present (Lumineux, Minéral, Méditerranéen)
Calanques Collection: Premium gallery with 30 photos and featured badge
Calanques Collection: Intro quote section with author attribution
Calanques Collection: Ecology section at bottom with tabs
Sunset Collection: Cinematic theme with orange badge 'Golden Hour'
Sunset Collection: All atmosphere tags present (Cinématique, Chaleureux, Émotionnel)
Sunset Collection: Premium gallery with asymmetric layout (1 featured, 1 medium, 9 standard)
Sunset Collection: Beautiful warm/golden color scheme matching cinematic theme
Lightbox functionality: Opens full-screen photo viewer on click
Wishlist/Heart buttons: Clickable and show visual feedback
Mobile responsiveness: Both collections adapt properly to 390x844 viewport
Navigation: Back to Collections button present and functional
Theme-specific styling: Calanques (turquoise) vs Sunset (orange) themes clearly distinct
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Collections page navigation to Sunset collection (clicking from collections page should navigate properly). Optional: Fix backend API endpoints for collections and wishlist persistence.
